title: ATM Skimmer Installation Attempt
description: An alert triggers on CAM-01 near the parking lot ATM kiosk. The agent must inspect the frame, detect a person installing a skimming device on the ATM, classify the risk, and escalate for police response.

frames.description: Parking lot at night. Well-lit ATM kiosk in the corner near the entrance. Several parked vehicles. No suspicious activity visible.
Parking lot. A person wearing a hooded jacket is crouching at the ATM kiosk, appearing to attach a device to the card reader slot. They are working quickly with tools visible in their hand.

Parking lot. The suspect has finished attaching the device and is now stepping back, appearing to test the ATM as a normal user to verify the skimmer is hidden. The device is visible on the card reader.
